texts.text: Christmas supplement $45 per person per day from 24/12/24 to 3/1/25

texts.text: * CHILDREN BETWEEN 2-12 YRS SHARING WITH 2 ADULTS WOULD PAY 50% OF ADULT RATE

texts.text: *CHILD U-12 YEARS SHARING WITH 1 PAX PAYS 75% OF PER PERSON RATE EXTRA LUNCH (OR PACKED LUNCH) CHARGED @ $30 PER PERSON

texts.label: text
texts.orig: a) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 90 and 76 days - 20% of the total cost will be charged
texts.text: a) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 90 and 76 days - 20% of the total cost will be charged

texts.label: text
texts.orig: b) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 75 and 66 days - 50% of the total cost will be charged
texts.text: b) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 75 and 66 days - 50% of the total cost will be charged

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: c) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 65 days and no show - 100% of the total cost will be charged
texts.text: c) For accommodation cancelled or reduced in number between 65 days and no show - 100% of the total cost will be charged

texts.label: footnote
texts.orig: d) Peak season a non refundable 30% deposit must be made to confirm booking and balance is payable 90days prior to arrival
texts.text: d) Peak season a non refundable 30% deposit must be made to confirm booking and balance is payable 90days prior to arrival
